name: Int6 STE + SmearGate + Seq2048 + OrthoInit + RoPE50K + NorMuon WD + SWA/100
author: dexhunter
blurb: 9-layer transformer with int6 STE quantization-aware training, NorMuon optimizer with decoupled weight decay, SmearGate embedding context, orthogonal initialization, seq_len=2048 with RoPE base 50K, stochastic weight averaging every 100 steps, sliding window evaluation.
